# When Stars Align
## Scripture
"But you, Israel, are my servant, Jacob, whom I have chosen, you descendants of Abraham my friend, I took you from the ends of the earth, from its farthest corners I called you. I said, 'You are my servant' ; I have chosen you and have not rejected you." - Isaiah 41:8-9

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we are reminded of God's promise to Abraham - that his descendants would be as numerous as the stars. The alignment of stars in the constellations is a testament to God's sovereignty and faithfulness. Just as the positions of the stars are carefully orchestrated, our lives are also part of a larger plan. We are chosen and called by God, just like Abraham, to be His servants and to shine like stars in a dark world.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the beauty of the night sky, we are reminded of Your faithfulness and sovereignty. Help us to trust in Your plan and to shine like stars, reflecting Your light and love to those around us. May we be faithful servants, just like Abraham, and may our lives be a testament to Your glory. Thank You for choosing us and for calling us to be part of Your grand plan. Amen.
